message:
feat(tui): add sort controls to build history panel

Completes bd-15dp: Add TUI sort controls to build history panel

Changes:
- Add BuildHistorySort enum with 6 options:
  - TimeDesc (default) / TimeAsc
  - DurationDesc / DurationAsc
  - WorkerAsc (group by worker)
  - StatusFailFirst (failures first)
- Add build_history_sort field to TuiState
- Integrate sorting into filtered_build_history()
- Add keyboard shortcuts: 's' to cycle sort, 'S' to reverse
- Update panel title to show current sort indicator

Usage:
- Press 's' in build history panel to cycle: time -> duration -> worker -> status
- Press 'S' to reverse direction (for time/duration)
- Panel title shows: "Build History [N] (sorted: time ↓)"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
